# Security Policy

This repository is a local research project and does not operate a hosted service.

## Reporting

If you find a security issue, please open a GitHub issue with non-sensitive details and mark the title clearly as security-related. Do not include secrets, private keys, access tokens, or unreleased model files in public issues.

For dependency or script issues, include the affected file, command, and environment. I will prioritize reports that could expose local files, credentials, or unsafe execution behavior.
